Same outward shape as s02. The diff is internal — the Loop reads
LLMResponse.ToolCalls instead of walking ContentBlocks.

$ go run . -v "list .go files"
[s03] model=claude-sonnet-4-6 tools=1 max_turns=20
[turn 0] assistant: I'll list the .go files.
[turn 0] -> bash map[command:ls *.go]
[turn 0] <- bash_tool.go loop.go main.go provider.go provider_anthropic.go provider_fake.go registry.go tools.go
[turn 1] assistant: Eight .go files: ...
Eight .go files: ...

If your run errors with "provider error http_401" — your ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
is wrong (s03 surfaces this distinctly thanks to the LLMResponse.Err* fields).

If "provider error http_429: ... retryable=false" — your account hit a quota
limit. Renew billing.

If "provider error http_429: ... retryable=true" — temporary rate limit.
s04 will add retry logic; for now just rerun.
